items.title: Market will be more volatile than 'patient' on AI CapEx
items.description: US stocks (^DJI, ^IXIC, ^GSPC) are ticking up on Monday to start the shortened trading week. What is Wall Street's market outlook for 2026 as more experts consider the risk tied to certain variables, such as the debt profiles attached to the AI trade? The Wealth Alliance President and Managing Director Eric Diton shares his thoughts. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination.

items.title: A Topsy-Turvy Year for Oracle and the Ellisons Will Bleed Into 2026
items.description: Oracle is radically changing its finances as it shifts from software to the cloud. Now its Chairman Larry Ellison is getting his fingers into media.
